title: Agent Loop Lifecycle
description:
单个 agent 的完整生命周期：launch → provider loop → API call → streaming → tool execution → yield/resume → stop → restart recovery。

这个领域覆盖一个 agent 从创建到销毁过程中所有的行为和边界情况。

## 核心子系统
- **Launch**: runAgentForNode, worktree creation, session setup
- **Provider loop**: callAPI, streaming, retry, abort handling
- **Tool execution**: executeTool, bash, read_file, MCP tools
- **Yield/Resume**: explicit yield, implicit yield, queue.wait
- **Stop/Restart**: stopTask, abort signal, session replacement
- **JSONL repair**: buildSessionRepair, orphan detection, truncate-and-rebuild
- **Image handling**: validation at read_file and provider level
- **Recovery**: API 400 recovery, duplicate tool_result prevention
